title: Publishing to social media

posts.author: edan (Edan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there!

I’ve been messing around with ClickUp and Monday to see if I can move over from AirTable.

One thing that’s been a struggle is publishing to social media. We plan social media posts every month and via AirTable push relevant fields to a Zapier webhook.

What would be the best approach to tackle this with Monday? I’m not interested in using a third part software like Hootsuite. We’ve been down that road a year or two ago and it got too messy having the posts live in a task management system as well as their scheduler.

Thanks in advance!

posts.author: edan (Edan)
posts.cookedHtml:
I just tried again to push a post to a Zapier Webhook and it seems like essential data is missing.
There’s a long text field with the actual post’s caption that’s not being included in the webhook for some reason.

posts.author: dharmik (Dharmik Jagodana)
posts.cookedHtml:
Are you also including images in your social media posts?

How’s that working for you?

posts.author: 0xm3t1 (Flynn .Is)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, this might be a bit late, but for anyone still looking—Publisher is currently the only app in the monday.com marketplace that lets you publish to multiple social media platforms directly from your board, without leaving monday.com Try it out

monday.com

Publisher : Social Media - monday.com Marketplace

Schedule & publish multichannel social media post templates.

Hope this helps!
